name: Dog Fest Rabbit Ears With Duck 90G
description: Tender duck meat wrapped in crispy rabbit ears. This treat will let the dog enjoy both: a long chew and the mouth-watering taste of duck. Composition: duck, rabbit ear, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 34, crude fat 3, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4.5, moisture 18.
